course.name: Waray for Life in Samar
course.description: A practical beginner-to-intermediate Waray course designed for English-speaking adults building a life in Samar. The course emphasizes everyday spoken Waray, confidence, and community connection.
course.design_notes: The course follows a gentle spiral progression designed for older adult learners. Early phases focus on survival communication, family, and home life. Later phases expand into community participation, health, travel, storytelling, and extended conversation. Vocabulary is heavily recycled through stories and apply lessons.

course_map.phase_goal: Handle basic greetings and simple daily interactions.

units.title: Hello and Names
units.can_do: I can greet people and say my name.

units.title: Family
units.can_do: I can talk about close family members.

units.title: Home
units.can_do: I can identify people and things at home.

units.title: Food and Drink
units.can_do: I can talk about eating and drinking.

units.title: Daily Routines
units.can_do: I can describe simple daily activities.

units.title: Rooms and Furniture
units.can_do: I can describe rooms in a house.

units.title: Chores
units.can_do: I can talk about household tasks.

units.title: Time and Days
units.can_do: I can discuss time and schedules.

units.title: Weather
units.can_do: I can talk about the weather.

units.title: Visitors and Hospitality
units.can_do: I can welcome guests and socialize.

course_map.phase_goal: Participate in village and community interactions.

units.title: Neighbors
units.can_do: I can chat with neighbors.

units.title: Directions

units.can_do: I can travel locally.

units.can_do: I can understand prices and numbers.

units.title: Banking and Payments

units.title: Medicine
units.can_do: I can discuss medications.

units.title: Emergencies

units.can_do: I can offer and request help.

units.title: Feelings
units.can_do: I can express feelings.

units.title: Past Experiences
units.can_do: I can talk about the past.

units.title: Future Plans
units.can_do: I can discuss future plans.

units.title: Invitations
units.can_do: I can invite people and respond.

units.title: Family Stories
units.can_do: I can share family stories.

units.title: Work and Projects

units.can_do: I can arrange repairs and construction.

units.title: Travel Around the Region
units.can_do: I can travel independently.

units.title: Local Customs
units.can_do: I can discuss customs and traditions.

units.can_do: I can express and justify opinions.

units.title: Telling Stories
units.can_do: I can narrate experiences.

units.title: Solving Problems
units.can_do: I can explain problems and solutions.

units.title: Community Participation
units.can_do: I can participate in meetings.

units.title: Life in the Philippines
units.can_do: I can discuss everyday life in depth.

units.title: Capstone Conversations
units.can_do: I can sustain real-life conversations.

_detailed_units_note: Full Phase-1 detail (u1-u5) preserved in the original chat transcript; abridged here to the course map. Re-paste detail when ingesting.
